label: KC-0052 Issue 5 — Active assignment integrity audit
method: Firebase Admin read-only scan of connections + karkuns

rootCauseAssessment.uiFilterBug: Ruled out — Connected lists filter Active by exact ruknId
rootCauseAssessment.historicalRisk: Pre-KC-0050 duplicate karkun mobiles could place the same person under two Rukns as different kr-* IDs; KC-0050 removed those registry duplicates
rootCauseAssessment.remainingRuntimeRisk: Non-atomic transfer (remove then assign) + stale client saveState upsert can revive old Actives across clients; KC-003 keep-newest may then pick a survivor by timestamp

mitigationsInKc0052: Transfer UI no longer silently no-ops on same-Rukn / stale form state
Transfer failures surface in modal footer with loading state
Engine returns failure when Transfer options target the current Rukn
